text:
料理人とはいえ、料理のことだけを
考えていてはまだまだ一流とは
言えないのよね。

味だけでなく、目でもお客さんを
楽しませてこその一流。
それに必要なのが、美しい器。

ディランダールの水晶片……
あの美しさ、私の料理にふさわしい。

と、いうことで。
お願いお願い！　あの水晶を
集めて

In order to be a top-tier chef, you have to
stretch your mind and think beyond flavors now
and then.

A real chef gives people a feast for the eyes as
well as the mouth. And to do that, you need
some gorgeous serving vessels.

And you know what would be just perfect to
serve my cooking in? That's right. Dirandahl
crystal shards.

So... that's my request! Go round up some of
those crystal shards for me! Pretty please!
